title: Heal Timer
description: Simple utility mod to count remaining heal cooldown via nametag-based timer.
body:
# Heal Timer

## Introduction
Upgraded & Updated version of the **HealCooldown v2**, and works fine in `craftm.kr` or `rtsv24.kr`.

## Features
- Automatically starts and displays a timer when detecting heal cooldowns (both your own and others’).
- Configurable settings menu to adjust cooldown duration (seconds), timer text color, and more.
- Dedicated hotkeys for easy toggling and cooldown reset.

## Required Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional, used for configuration)

## Important Notes
1. This mod is officially distributed with permission from the server administrators (Usage approved)
2. The source code will be released later (please respect the license terms)
3. Do not use this mod for malicious or unfair purposes

## Credits
> *Developed & Maintained solely by [yfc](https://modrinth.com/user/yfc)*
